title: Convert CSV to YAML List of Mappings
cap_description: Convert CSV data to a YAML sequence of mappings with keys from the header row
documentation:
## Purpose

Converts a CSV file into a YAML sequence of mappings. Each data row becomes one YAML mapping; the CSV header row supplies the keys. Use this when a downstream cap or tool expects YAML but the data source is CSV.

## Inputs

A CSV file with a header row and one or more data rows.

## Outputs

A YAML sequence of mappings, one per CSV row.

## Notes

- For JSON output instead, use [Convert CSV to JSON Array of Objects](https://capdag.com/browse/cap:in="media:csv;list;record;textable";op=convert_format;out="media:json;list;record;textable").
- For the reverse, use [Convert YAML List of Mappings to CSV](https://capdag.com/browse/cap:in="media:list;record;textable;yaml";op=convert_format;out="media:csv;list;record;textable").
